focus: The war begins only after hesitation, blessing, and choice.
Commanders test whether blood ties can survive the first sustained advance.

phases: Krishna leaves the chariot in fury
focus: The field bends until Krishna nearly breaks his own vow.

phases: The Pandava line follows the breach
focus: One warrior's strength becomes a moving fault through the host.

phases: Both armies renew their ordered ranks
focus: The war becomes attrition before either side admits it.
A successful breach becomes danger when the line cannot keep pace.

phases: Arjuna is drawn toward the center
focus: The army learns that the first commander cannot be merely contained.
Family vengeance begins to dictate formation and risk.
The divine charioteer again reaches the limit of chosen restraint.

phases: The Pandava line narrows toward Bhishma
Bhishma lowers his answer to Shikhandi
Arjuna fills the opening with arrows
focus: The first commander falls through a wound older than the war.

phases: The Pandavas shield Yudhishthira from capture
focus: A new commander replaces endurance with design.

formation: The challenge draws the bow away
phases: Bhagadatta's elephants crush the open ground
focus: The field is divided so its strongest defender cannot answer both crises.

phases: Jayadratha seals the following army outside
Six chariots close on the isolated center
focus: A formation becomes a trap when rescue loses the breach.

phases: Jayadratha is buried behind layered hosts
Arjuna cuts a road toward the west
The false dusk opens the final line
focus: An entire army is arranged around one head and one deadline.

phases: Drona destroys the Panchala and Matsya fronts
The commander lays down his weapons
focus: The formation collapses only when belief is attacked instead of skill.

phases: The Kaurava host drives as one body
Arjuna clears the returning southern front
focus: For one day the exhausted army fights as if its faith were new.

phases: The armies peel away from Karna and Arjuna
The serpent arrow misses by a hand's breadth
focus: Thirty years of rivalry contract into one failing chariot.

phases: The sleeping camp is opened to the night
focus: Victory is declared, then emptied before morning.
